_invariant: Real Morpho exposure graph for ezETH (Renzo LRT) at the 2024-04-24 depeg. ezETH supply REAL on-chain (1,044,370 @ block 19722430, 2024-04-24T03:02:11Z, 18dp, Alchemy archive). One Morpho Blue ezETH/WETH collateral edge with a MARKET-PRICE ezETH/ETH oracle (depeg_sensitive=true — averaged feed, which is why leveraged loops crossed the 86% LLTV and liquidated, realizing ~11 WETH bad debt). ezETH is pegged to ETH, not USD: the per-case peg_probe price is the ezETH/ETH ratio (peg=1.0 = 1 ETH-equiv). Depeg price injected per-case; the thin-pool ~0.27 Uniswap flash print is NOT used (the oracle registered the sustained ~0.80-0.85, not the flash).

meta.data_source: on-chain Alchemy archive (ezETH 0xbf54…2110 @ block 19722430, supply 1.044M, 18dp) + Morpho ezETH/WETH market from the Gauntlet LRT Core Vault post-mortem (LLTV 0.86, ~7.6k WETH, market-price oracle)

metadata._note: Liquid restaking token pegged to ETH (Renzo restaked-ETH exchange rate). No native withdrawals at the time → only exit was a thin DEX pool. REZ-airdrop backlash (2024-04-24) triggered a loop-unwind cascade; ezETH fell to ~0.80-0.85 of ETH backing on a market-price oracle and liquidated leveraged loops. No backing failure of Renzo.
ezETH/WETH loop market funded largely by the Gauntlet LRT Core Vault; ~11 WETH bad debt realized, ~7 WETH socialized.

oracle.oracle_provider: Market-price ezETH/ETH (averaged Chainlink/RedStone) — tracks the real DEX discount, NOT a hardcoded exchange rate

meta.data_source: Morpho ezETH/WETH, LLTV 0.86, market-price oracle — the regime where the depeg crossed the liquidation line and realized bad debt.
